rules.name: Port Scan Detection
rules.description: Single source IP contacts an unusually high number of distinct destination ports on the same destination host within a short time window.

rules.name: SYN Flood / Packet Flood Detection
rules.description: Single source IP sends an abnormally high volume of packets to the same destination host/port within a short time window.

rules.name: SSH Brute Force Detection
rules.description: Single source IP produces repeated failed authentication attempts against the same or different accounts within a short time window.

rules.name: Suspicious Destination Port
rules.description: Traffic destined for ports commonly associated with malware C2, backdoors, or unauthorized remote access.
